title: FeatureMarkers
description: Schema for defining morphological formatives for a single feature.

source_path.description: The file path from which this config was loaded.

feature.description: The name of the linguistic feature being marked (e.g., 'person').

inherits.description: Path to another config to inherit markers from.

global_order.description: Allows specifying a default value for the 'order' attribute.

markers.description: Map of feature values to their morphological realizations.

global_marker.description: A marker applied to all forms in this paradigm.
